translations.en: Valkadesh
translations.zh: 瓦卡德許

translations.en: a tall, thin, winged gargoyle.
translations.zh: 身形高挑削瘦之有翼魔像。

translations.en: "Greetings, friend '$P."
translations.zh: 「問候，吾友'$P。」

translations.en: "To see you have done the honorable thing."
translations.zh: 「見汝已行榮譽之舉。」

translations.en: "To have earned much respect from my people by doing this!"
translations.zh: 「如此行事，已贏得吾族諸多敬重！」

translations.en: "To hope your travels have brought you wisdom?"
translations.zh: 「盼汝旅途之中已有所得悟？」

translations.en: "To wish to hear about it!"
translations.zh: 「吾願聞其詳！」

translations.en: "To regret that, and to wish to aid you."
translations.zh: 「為此深感遺憾，並願助汝一臂之力。」

translations.en: "To offer greetings, False Prophet."
translations.zh: 「向偽先知致意。」

translations.en: "To have waited long for you to return to this side of the world."
translations.zh: 「吾已久候汝歸返此側世界。」

translations.en: "To believe that the Book of Prophecies is wrong."
translations.zh: 「吾深信預言之書有所謬誤。」

translations.en: "To believe that I can reason with you, persuade you to spare my people."
translations.zh: 「吾深信可與汝講理，說服汝放過吾族。」

translations.en: "To wish to address you honorably: To ask your name?"
translations.zh: 「吾願以禮相稱：敢問汝之名諱？」

translations.en: "Noble '$0, to see that you are a being of honor and respect."
translations.zh: 「高貴之'$0，見汝為榮譽而值得尊重之人。」

translations.en: "To not betray that honor - to return the @Codex!"
translations.zh: 「莫辜負此榮譽——歸還@Codex守則之書！」

translations.en: "To save my people from the @prophecy!"
translations.zh: 「拯救吾族脫離@prophecy預言之詛！」

translations.en: "To be called Valkadesh Wis-lem, Valkadesh the Scholar."
translations.zh: 「吾名瓦卡德許·維斯-蘭，即學者瓦卡德許。」

translations.en: "To have been given a @partial name. To have yet to achieve full honor."
translations.zh: 「曾獲賜@partial部分之名。尚未達到完整榮譽。」

translations.en: "To be a Scholar. To be seeking a way to avert the @prophecy."
translations.zh: 「吾乃學者。正尋覓阻止@prophecy預言之法。」

translations.en: "To be greatly honored by even a partial name."
translations.zh: 「即便只是部分之名，亦深感榮幸。」

translations.en: "To be customary among my people to give names only to those most worthy."
translations.zh: 「吾族習俗，唯有最配得之人方可獲賜名諱。」

translations.en: "To be written in the Book of Prophecies that you would destroy our world."
translations.zh: 「預言之書所載，汝將毀滅吾族之世界。」

translations.en: "To also be written that only the @sacrifice of the False Prophet would save us."
translations.zh: 「亦載，唯偽先知之@sacrifice犧牲方可拯救吾族。」

translations.en: "To believe that it is not too late."
translations.zh: 「吾深信現在為時未晚。」

translations.en: "To beg you to return the Codex."
translations.zh: 「懇請汝歸還守則之書。」

translations.en: "Avert the @prophecy! Save your life, and my people's lives as well!"
translations.zh: 「阻止@prophecy預言！保全汝之性命，也保全吾族之命！」

translations.en: "To be the only alternative to returning the Codex."
translations.zh: 「此乃除歸還守則之書之外唯一的選擇。」

translations.en: "Without the Codex, to have no @choice but to sacrifice your life!"
translations.zh: 「無守則之書，則別無@choice選擇，唯有獻出汝之性命！」

translations.en: "Wait! To know that sacrifice has three meanings: of self, of others and of valuables."
translations.zh: 「且慢！犧牲有三重含義：自我、他人、以及貴重之物。」

translations.en: "Perhaps to find a better @answer in one of those other meanings."
translations.zh: 「或可在另兩重含義中尋得更佳之@answer解答。」

translations.en: "To be unable to help more."
translations.zh: 「吾無力再多助汝。」

translations.en: "To suggest you seek out @Naxatilor himself for further enlightenment."
translations.zh: 「建議汝親自去尋@Naxatilor納薩蒂，以求進一步啟示。」

translations.en: "To learn much from Naxatilor, the wisest gargoyle."
translations.zh: 「可從最睿智之魔像納薩蒂處學到甚多。」

translations.en: "To find his chambers just to the northeast of the Hall of Knowledge."
translations.zh: 「其居所在智識之殿東北方。」

translations.en: "To suggest you go there and ask him of sacrifice."
translations.zh: 「建議汝前往彼處，向其詢問犧牲之義。」

translations.en: "To go to Draxinusom, the Inquisitor and leader of my race."
translations.zh: 「前往崔西努森，即吾族之審問者與統領。」

translations.en: "To find his chambers just to the northwest of the Hall of Knowledge."
translations.zh: 「其居所在智識之殿西北方。」

translations.en: "To @surrender to him, that you may travel @freely in our land."
translations.zh: 「向其@surrender歸降，汝方可@freely自由往來吾族之地。」

translations.en: "To know that the moons are not properly aligned yet for the ritual."
translations.zh: 「知曉月相尚未對齊，儀式之時機未到。」

translations.en: "To assure you that you will not be sacrificed for many weeks."
translations.zh: 「可向汝保證，數週之內汝不會遭獻祭。」

translations.en: "To assure you further that surrender is the only way you can travel among my people."
translations.zh: 「更可向汝保證，歸降乃是汝往來吾族之間的唯一途徑。」

translations.en: "To have done the honorable thing and now be respected and unfeared by my people."
translations.zh: 「汝已行榮譽之舉，如今可受吾族尊重而無所畏懼。」

translations.en: "To travel to the @Inquisitor."
translations.zh: 「前往@Inquisitor審問者處。」

translations.en: "To tell the Inquisitor that you surrender."
translations.zh: 「告知審問者汝願歸降。」

translations.en: "Then to be no longer a threat, and no longer be feared."
translations.zh: 「如此汝便不再是威脅，亦不再遭人畏懼。」

translations.en: "May your precision and persistence lead to success!"
translations.zh: 「願精準與恆毅引領汝走向成功！」
translations.note: 魔像道別語，三原則典型用語

translations.en: As you turn to leave, the gargoyle stops you.
translations.zh: 你轉身欲離，魔像攔住了你。

translations.en: "Wait," he calls. "To be feared and hated by all gargoyles."
translations.zh: 「且慢，」他呼喚道。「汝為全體魔像所懼所恨。」

translations.en: "To be unsafe for you right now, False Prophet."
translations.zh: 「偽先知，汝目前處境甚為危險。」

translations.en: "To surrender is only answer."
translations.zh: 「歸降乃唯一之道。」

translations.en: "To surrender to Inquisitor."
translations.zh: 「向審問者歸降。」

translations.en: "Then to be no longer a threat, and then not to be feared by my people!"
translations.zh: 「如此汝便不再是威脅，亦不再遭吾族畏懼！」

translations.en: "To surrender to the @Inquisitor, and then to be @free to look for the solution."
translations.zh: 「向@Inquisitor審問者歸降，而後@free自由地尋覓解決之道。」

translations.en: "To be confused by your accent."
translations.zh: 「汝之口音令吾困惑。」

translations.en: "To ask what $Z means?"
translations.zh: 「$Z是何意？」

translations.en: The gargoyle smiles, but his grin is somehow disturbing.
translations.zh: 魔像微笑，然那笑容不知為何令人不安。

translations.en: "I human @friend. Walk talk you."
translations.zh: 「我人類@friend朋友。走路說話你。」
translations.note: 破碎人類語（Captain John 的魔像友人段落）

translations.en: "Want much to talk."
translations.zh: 「很想說話。」

translations.en: "@Captain John speak; Captain John go!"
translations.zh: 「@Captain約翰船長說話；約翰船長走！」

translations.en: "@Captain John gargoyle friend. Captain John speak."
translations.zh: 「@Captain約翰船長魔像朋友。約翰船長說話。」

translations.en: "Must Captain John go. Only he speak. Must go!"
translations.zh: 「約翰船長必須走。只有他會說。必須走！」

translations.en: In a thick accent, the gargoyle croaks, "I bad with human language."
translations.zh: 魔像用濃重口音嘶啞地說：「我人類語言不好。」

translations.en: "With @Captain John must to speak."
translations.zh: 「必須和@Captain約翰船長說話。」

translator_notes: 瓦卡德許為魔像族學者，唯一相信預言可以被阻止之魔像，語氣溫和理性。後段有幾行「破碎人類語」（Captain John 友人），保留語法錯誤以示其說話困難。道別語「願精準與恆毅引領汝走向成功」為魔像典型祝辭。
